info.name: NexusFlow API
info.description:
NexusFlow - Project Management & Enterprise Operations Platform API

## Authentication
Most endpoints require JWT authentication. Use the `Login` endpoint to get an access token, then it will be automatically set in the collection variables.

## Test Account
- Email: `test@example.com`
- Password: `Test@123456`

## Rate Limits
- Register/Reset Password: 5 req/min
- Login/Refresh: 10 req/min
- General: 60 req/min

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, and token management

request.description:
Register a new user account.

**Password Requirements:**
- Min 8 characters
- At least 1 uppercase letter
- At least 1 lowercase letter
- At least 1 number
- At least 1 special character

Login with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.

Tokens are automatically saved to collection variables.
Refresh access token using a valid refresh token.
Logout and revoke the provided refresh token.
Logout from all devices by revoking all refresh tokens for the current user.
Request a password reset email. Rate limited to 3 requests per minute.
Reset password using the token received via email.
Get all workspaces the current user is a member of.
Create a new workspace. The creator automatically becomes the OWNER.
Get workspace details by ID. Requires workspace membership.
Update workspace details. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.
Delete a workspace. Requires OWNER role only.
List all members of a workspace with their user information.

Add a user as a member to the workspace. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.

**Roles:** OWNER, ADMIN, MEMBER

Update a member's role. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.

**Note:** ADMIN cannot change OWNER role.
Remove a member from the workspace. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.

Send an invitation to join the workspace. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.

**Roles:** OWNER, ADMIN, MEMBER
List all pending invitations for the workspace. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.
Cancel a pending invitation. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.
Accept a workspace invitation using the token from the invitation email.
Reject a workspace invitation.

item.name: Projects
item.description: Project management endpoints with pagination and filtering

query.description: Filter by status: ACTIVE, COMPLETED, ARCHIVED

request.description: List all projects in a workspace with pagination and filtering.
Create a new project in the workspace. All workspace members can create projects.
Get project details by ID.

Update project details. Requires project ownership, OWNER, or ADMIN role.

**Status values:** ACTIVE, COMPLETED, ARCHIVED
Delete a project. Requires project ownership, OWNER, or ADMIN role.

item.name: Tasks
item.description: Task management with advanced filtering and sorting

query.description: Filter by status: TODO, IN_PROGRESS, IN_REVIEW, DONE
Filter by priority: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, URGENT
Filter tasks with due date from (ISO 8601)
Filter tasks with due date to (ISO 8601)
Sort by: createdAt, dueDate, priority, status, title

request.description: List all tasks in a project with advanced filtering and sorting options.

Create a new task in the project.

**Priority values:** LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, URGENT
Create a subtask by providing a parentId.
Get task details by ID.
Get all subtasks of a task.

Update task details. Requires task ownership, OWNER, or ADMIN role.

**Status values:** TODO, IN_PROGRESS, IN_REVIEW, DONE
**Priority values:** LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, URGENT

Set `dueDate` to `null` to remove the due date.
Assign a task to a user. Set `assigneeId` to `null` to unassign.
Delete a task. Requires task ownership, OWNER, or ADMIN role.
List all comments on a task with pagination.
Add a comment to a task.
Update a comment. Only the comment author can update.
Delete a comment. Only the comment author can delete.
List all labels in a workspace.

Create a new label in the workspace. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.

**Color format:** Hex color code (#RRGGBB)
Update a label. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.
Delete a label. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.
Get all labels attached to a task.
Add a label to a task.
Remove a label from a task.

item.name: Files
item.description: File upload and management with pre-signed URLs

request.description:
Register a file upload and get a pre-signed URL for uploading.

**Returns:**
- `id`: File ID to use when attaching
- `uploadUrl`: Pre-signed URL for uploading the file
- `expiresAt`: URL expiration time

Upload file to the pre-signed URL. For local development only.

Use the `uploadUrl` from the Register Upload response.
Attach an uploaded file to a task.
List all file attachments for a task.
Get a pre-signed download URL for a file.
Delete a file.

query.description: USER, WORKSPACE, PROJECT, TASK, COMMENT, LABEL, MEMBER
Filter by user who performed action
CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, ASSIGN, ATTACH, DETACH

request.description: List all activity logs with filtering options.
Get activity logs for a specific task.
Get activity logs for a specific project.
Get activity logs for a specific workspace.

Get workspace statistics including project counts, task counts, completion rates, etc.

**Note:** Results are cached in Redis for 5 minutes.
List notifications with cursor-based pagination.
Get the count of unread notifications.
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read.
